meta.name: GymnexAI Concierge
meta.fallback: I'm afraid that's outside what I'm trained on at the moment. The fastest answer would come from our team — a thirty-minute private demo is on the house. Would you like me to point you to it?
meta.greeting: Good day. I'm the GymnexAI Concierge — here to answer anything about the operating layer behind premium gyms. Ask, or pick a starting point below.

entries.answer: GymnexAI is the operating system for modern fitness businesses — a single, deliberate control room for retention, lead conversion, member experience, and day-to-day operations. We sit quietly behind premium gyms, studios and clubs, conducting the work so owners can focus on the craft of the floor.

The system is composed in four movements. I — Retention Intelligence: foresight before farewell. II — Lead Conversion: an always-on concierge that handles new lead enquiries on WhatsApp. III — Operations Atelier: members, billing, attendance and trainers in one command surface. IV — Member Experience: personal programming and recovery delivered through the channels members already trust.

questions: How do you stop members from leaving?
How do you identify at-risk members?
entries.answer: We read the quiet signals — missed sessions, softer engagement, billing friction, declining check-in cadence — and surface members drifting toward goodbye weeks before they cancel. The system then drafts a personal, on-brand outreach in your house voice. On average, operators see a 44% reduction in monthly attrition within the first quarter.

questions: Can you reply to leads after hours?
entries.answer: GymnexAI helps gyms handle new lead enquiries coming through WhatsApp. When a potential member messages your gym, the system can respond quickly, clearly, and in your brand voice — so interested leads are not missed or left waiting.

questions: How does WhatsApp work with GymnexAI?
Can leads message us on WhatsApp?
entries.answer: Yes. GymnexAI helps gyms handle new lead enquiries on WhatsApp. When someone messages to ask about pricing, timings, facilities, trials or membership details, the system replies quickly and clearly in your gym's voice.

questions: What does the operations dashboard show?
Can you manage members and attendance?
Do you replace my current CRM?
What does the control room look like?
entries.answer: One command surface. Members, recurring payments, attendance, trainers, classes, leads, retention and revenue health — composed in a single deliberate dashboard. Most operators retire three to five separate tools in their first month. The data finally lives in one place, and so does the decision.

questions: What is the member experience like?
entries.answer: A coach in every pocket — without another app to download. Personal programming, recovery nudges, nutrition guidance and ritual reminders arrive on WhatsApp, delivered with restraint and in your studio's voice. Members keep using the channel they already trust; the intelligence happens quietly underneath.

GymnexAI pricing depends on your gym's size, requirements, and the level of automation needed. The best way to understand the right setup is to book a private demo, where our team can walk you through the system and suggest the right plan.

questions: How quickly can we go live?
How do you migrate our data?
entries.answer: Onboarding generally takes 7–14 days, depending on the gym's setup, data, WhatsApp Business readiness, and the level of customization required. Our goal is to get the system live smoothly without disturbing your existing operations.

questions: Is this for small studios or chains?
Do you work with boutique gyms?
entries.answer: GymnexAI is built for modern gyms, fitness clubs, and studios that want better retention, smarter operations, and a more premium member experience.

Member data is encrypted at rest and in transit, stored in regional zones (Mumbai for India, Frankfurt for EU, Virginia for US) and never shared, sold or used to train external models. We are SOC 2 Type II in progress, DPDP-aligned in India, and GDPR-compliant for European clients. Your data remains your data.

questions: Do you connect to my existing tools?
Can you work with my current software?
entries.answer: Native connectors include Stripe, Razorpay, GoCardless, Google Calendar, Mindbody, Glofox, ABC Fitness, Meta WhatsApp Business, Apple Wallet pass, and webhooks for everything else. Most operators replace three to five tools; for what stays, we sync cleanly through API or Zapier.

questions: Can you reply in Hindi or Spanish?
Can it operate in multiple languages?
entries.answer: The system replies natively in English, Hindi, Tamil, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese and Arabic, and detects the language of the inbound message automatically. Voice and tone are calibrated per language so a Hindi reply sounds like your studio's Hindi, not a translation.

Yes. Multi-location operators get a group view across every studio — revenue, retention and pipeline — with the ability to drill into any single location. House voice can stay unified across the group or be tuned per location. Staff permissions are scoped by studio.

GymnexAI was founded in Bengaluru in MMXXIV by Akshat Chauhan. The team comes from the intersection of AI research, fitness operations and editorial design — building software that reads as quietly considered as the studios it serves.

questions: How do I book a demo?
Can I see GymnexAI in action?
How do I talk to your team?
entries.answer: A thirty-minute private demo is the most direct path — composed around your operation, with no pitch deck. We walk you through the system, your data, and what the next quarter could look like. You can request one at /contact, or tell me a little about your studio and I'll guide you there.

Across the operators we work with: +62% lead → trial conversion, −44% monthly member attrition, 11 hours reclaimed per owner per week, and a median reply time under two minutes, day or night. Case studies for Atelier Athletic and others are in /blog.

questions: Will it sound like a robot?
Can you match our brand voice?
entries.answer: The house voice is calibrated to your studio in a single working session with your founder. We capture cadence, vocabulary, the small house phrases — and the system writes inside that voice. Members tell operators they cannot tell which messages were composed by the system and which by the front desk. That is the point.
